response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack/web developer with broad polyglot background, but the resume shows no Japanese language ability (a hard requirement), no embedded firmware or LAN-switch experience, no MACsec/802.1X/Captive Portal security work, and only marginal C exposure (a brief stint at National Instruments a decade ago). Core stack is JS/TS/DLang for web and platform work, which does not align with embedded C, Linux kernel modification, or chip-vendor SDK requirements.
strengths: Long track record across diverse domains including some C/C++ work at National Instruments
Strong software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling)
concerns: No native-level Japanese language proficiency indicated
No embedded networking, LAN-switch, or security-protocol (MACsec, 802.1X) experience
C programming is minimal and dated; no Linux kernel source modification experience

key_factors.factor: Insufficient C and Linux kernel depth
